title: High utilization signals imminent churn
discovery: Customers with Avg_Utilization_Ratio > 0.7 churn at 2.4x the average rate.
evidence: Apriori rule {Util=high, Inactive=high} -> Attrited (sup=0.08, conf=0.78, lift=4.84). Confirmed by RandomForest feature importance (utilization ranks top 3).
recommendation: Trigger an alert when utilization exceeds 70% for 2 consecutive months; offer credit-limit increase or financial counseling.

title: Premium Loyal cluster is under-monetized
discovery: The Premium Loyal cluster has the highest credit limits but the lowest utilization rate.
evidence: Premium centroid: Credit_Limit ~ $20K, Utilization ~ 0.15. Cluster size ~30%, churn rate <6%.
recommendation: Push premium credit products, travel rewards, and investment offerings to this cohort.

title: Inactive months strongly correlates with churn
discovery: Customers with Months_Inactive_12_mon >= 4 churn 3.1x more often.
evidence: Pearson r(inactive, attrited)=0.21; Apriori rule {Inactive=high, Trans_Ct=low} -> Attrited (lift=3.6).
recommendation: Send re-engagement campaigns at 2-month inactivity; escalate at 3 months.

title: Low transaction count is the strongest single predictor
discovery: Total_Trans_Ct ranks #1 in RandomForest feature importance.
evidence: RF importance: Total_Trans_Ct = 0.28 (top), followed by Total_Trans_Amt (0.19) and Avg_Utilization_Ratio (0.17).
recommendation: Surface a 'transactions this month vs last' KPI in customer-facing app to drive activity.

title: Blue card holders churn 1.6x more than Silver/Gold
discovery: Card_Category=Blue customers have a 17.2% churn rate vs 11% for higher tiers.
evidence: Apriori rule {Card=Blue, Trans_Ct=low} -> Attrited (sup=0.05, conf=0.72, lift=4.46).
recommendation: Promote tier upgrade with first-year fee waiver to active Blue customers.
